calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
thomas Caudill, Esq. for Plaintiff: PDM Steel Service Centers, Inc.
Order waiving live witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considered the declaration of Susan Schiaffini in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Forem Manufacturing, Inc., a California corp. and Roland Maynard as follows:
Attorney's Fees $6,650.00
Costs $85.65, for a total of $6,735.65
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2006 Continued To Jul-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2006 Continued To Jun-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
